zh.Thornhill, Metropolitan Borough of Kirkl: 英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾
zh.Golcar, Metropolitan borough of Kirklees: 英國英格蘭越可爾格爾卡
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Savile於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾時，他的父親John de Saville II21歲，母親Agnes d'Aldwark22歲。他和Mrs John de Savile至少有3個兒子。他去世於大約1250年在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.Thornhill, Metropolitan Borough of Kirkl: 英国英格兰越可爾恩爾
zh-hans.Golcar, Metropolitan borough of Kirklees: 英国英格兰越可爾格爾卡
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Savile于大约1200年出生在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾时，他的父亲John de Saville II21岁，母亲Agnes d'Aldwark22岁。他和Mrs John de Savile至少有3个儿子。他去世于大约1250年在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Savile was born about 1200, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Saville II, was 21 and his mother, Agnes d'Aldwark, was 22. He had at least 3 sons with Mrs John de Savile. He died about 1250, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Savile est né environ 1200, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Saville II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes d'Aldwark, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Mrs John de Savile. Il est décédé environ 1250, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Savile um 1200 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Saville II 21 und seine Mutter Agnes d'Aldwark 22. Er hatte mit Mrs John de Savile mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1250 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Savile è nato il circa 1200 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Saville II, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Agnes d'Aldwark, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Mrs John de Savile. Morì circa 1250, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Savileが約1200年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父John de Saville IIは21歳，母Agnes d'Aldwarkは22歳であった。彼はMrs John de Savileとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1250年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Savile(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Saville II(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes d'Aldwark(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mrs John de Savile(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1250년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1200–Abt 1250: tany ho any amin'ny 1200–tany ho any amin'ny 1250

mn.Golcar, Metropolitan borough of Kirklees: Golcar, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Savile nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Saville II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes d'Aldwark, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Mrs John de Savile. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1250, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Savile родился около 1200 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Saville II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes d'Aldwark, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Mrs John de Savile. Он умер около 1250 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

sm.Abt 1200–Abt 1250: e tusa o le 1200–e tusa o le 1250

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Savile nació aproximadamente 1200, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Saville II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes d'Aldwark, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Mrs John de Savile. Murió aproximadamente 1250, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
